{% macro icon(name, size="20") %} {% if name == "arrow-right" %} {% elif name == "arrow-left" %} {% elif name == "book" %} {% elif name == "search" %} {% elif name == "menu" %} {% elif name == "close" %} {% elif name == "sun" %} {% elif name == "moon" %} {% elif name == "copy" %} {% elif name == "check" %} {% elif name == "github" %} {% endif %} {% endmacro icon %} {% macro docs_navigation(active_path, labelledby) %} {% set navigation = load_data(path="data/navigation.json") %}
{% for group in navigation %}

{{ group.title }}

    {% for item in group.items %}
  • {{ item.title }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
{% endmacro docs_navigation %} {% macro toc(items) %}
    {% for heading in items %}
  • {{ heading.title }} {% if heading.children %}{{ self::toc(items=heading.children) }}{% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endmacro toc %}
